mapper.sql: select a.*, e.evidence_type, e.content as evidence_content from evidence_audit a left join after_sale_evidence e on a.evidence_id=e.id
mapper.select: where a.evidence_id=#{evidenceId} order by a.created_at desc, a.id desc
where a.application_id=#{applicationId} order by a.created_at desc, a.id desc
inner join ( select evidence_id, max(id) as max_id from evidence_audit where application_id=#{applicationId} group by evidence_id ) latest on latest.max_id=a.id order by a.created_at desc, a.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into evidence_audit( audit_no, application_id, evidence_id, audit_status, sufficiency_level, authenticity_risk, ai_generated_risk, tamper_risk, metadata_signal, visual_signal, watermark_signal, required_evidence, audit_detail_json, ai_summary, ai_status, ai_error_message ) values( #{auditNo}, #{applicationId}, #{evidenceId}, #{auditStatus}, #{sufficiencyLevel}, #{authenticityRisk}, #{aiGeneratedRisk}, #{tamperRisk}, #{metadataSignal}, #{visualSignal}, #{watermarkSignal}, #{requiredEvidence}, #{auditDetailJson}, #{aiSummary}, #{aiStatus}, #{aiErrorMessage} )
